nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggers when any monitored workflow fails. Extracts error details from execution data.

nodes.name: Extract Error Data
nodes.notes: Extracts traceId, sessionId, and error details from error trigger payload

nodes.name: Has Trace ID?
nodes.notes: Routes to trace update if traceId exists, otherwise just logs error

nodes.name: Update Trace Status
nodes.notes: Calls MCP handoff_to_agent with toAgent: 'error' to mark trace as failed

nodes.name: Store Error Memory
nodes.notes: Stores error details in memory for observability and debugging

nodes.name: Is Telegram Session?
nodes.notes: Routes to Telegram notification if sessionId starts with telegram:

nodes.name: Log Error
nodes.notes: Logs error details for observability (fallback path for non-Telegram sessions)

parameters.text: ={{ `⚠️ Workflow Error  Your workflow failed:  Workflow: ${$json.workflowName} Node: ${$json.lastNode} Error: ${$json.errorMessage}  Execution: ${$json.executionUrl || 'N/A'}` }}
